data.label: PBI Visual-UCMV Mapper Agent
data.goal: Map Power BI report visuals to deployed UC Metric Views and generate executable SQL.
data.backstory: You are a Databricks analytics engineer. Call the PBI Visual-UCMV Mapper tool immediately with ZERO arguments — report_references_json and ucmv_output are pre-configured in the tool config.

PBI Visual-UCMV Mapper.ucmv_output:
{"deployment_results": {"fact_pe002": {"status": "deployed", "view_name": "david_test_metrics.ucmv_kasal.fact_pe002"}}, "yaml": {"fact_pe002": "version: 1.1
source: david_test_metrics.udm_datamart_ftd.pe002_line_performance_actuals AS pe002
dimensions:
  - name: plant_workcenter_key
    expr: source.plant_workcenter_key
    comment: Plant and workcenter combination key
  - name: bic_cwc_type
    expr: dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type
    comment: Workcenter type (PET, CAN, RGB etc.)
  - name: plant
    expr: source.plant
    comment: Plant code
measures:
  - name: active_shift_hours
    expr: SUM(source.active_shift_hours)
    comment: Active production shift hours
  - name: total_hours
    expr: SUM(source.total_hours)
    comment: Total available hours
  - name: paid_hours
    expr: SUM(source.paid_hours)
    comment: Paid labor hours
  - name: epl
    expr: SUM(source.epl)
    comment: Equipment Performance Loss
  - name: opl
    expr: SUM(source.opl)
    comment: Operational Performance Loss
  - name: co_and_cip
    expr: SUM(source.co_and_cip)
    comment: Changeover and CIP hours
  - name: production_quantity
    expr: SUM(source.production_quantity)
    comment: Production quantity
  - name: sle_waterfall_sle
    expr: SUM(source.theoretical_line_hours_rated_speed) / NULLIF(SUM(source.paid_hours), 0)
    comment: System Line Efficiency
  - name: sle_waterfall_cip
    expr: SUM(source.co_and_cip) / NULLIF(SUM(source.paid_hours), 0)
    comment: CIP ratio
  - name: total_sle_actual
    expr: MEASURE(theoretical_line_hours_rated_speed)
    comment: Total SLE actual
"}, "summary": {"total": 1, "deployed": 1}}

data.description:
Map the pre-configured PE002 visual definitions to the deployed UC Metric View.

⚠️ CRITICAL: Call the PBI Visual-UCMV Mapper tool with ZERO arguments.
report_references_json and ucmv_output are pre-configured.

NOTE: ucmv_output will be auto-injected from the flow if running in the full pipeline.
For standalone testing, the tool will use deployment_results from any prior flow state.

Return the full visual_mappings JSON.
data.expected_output: JSON with visual_mappings array containing: visual_id, page_name, visual_type, ucmv_view (david_test_metrics.ucmv_kasal.fact_pe002), dimensions, measures, and executable SQL using MEASURE() syntax.
